facebook.caption: Kingkong Mart on Đường Bạch Đằng is one of those quietly essential stops that every visitor to Phu Quoc ends up grateful for. Whether you need cold drinks for the beach, local snacks to try, or everyday toiletries you forgot to pack, this well-stocked grocery store has you covered. Rated 4.4/5 across 515 reviews, it clearly earns its reputation with travelers. Practical tip: stock up on bottled water and grab some Vietnamese instant noodles or local chips as easy, affordable souvenirs.
facebook.video_caption: Cold drinks, local snacks, beach supplies — watch how quickly Kingkong Mart solves all of it. The shelves are packed, the aisles are easy to navigate, and the checkout is fast even when the street outside is buzzing. This is the kind of store you visit once and immediately bookmark for every day of your trip.

instagram.caption: Your Phu Quoc beach bag deserves a pit stop at Kingkong Mart. Cold drinks, local snacks, and all the travel essentials you need, conveniently located on Đường Bạch Đằng. Rated 4.4/5 by 515 travelers. Tip: grab extra water before heading to the beach.
instagram.video_caption: Snacks, sunscreen, cold coconut water — Kingkong Mart on Đường Bạch Đằng has everything your Phu Quoc trip needs. One stop, zero stress. Your beach day starts here.

tiktok.caption: The grocery store every Phu Quoc visitor needs to know. Kingkong Mart delivers. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #TravelTips #IslandLife
